name: 船长室/操舵台
description: 铁鲸号的核心控制区域。高处设有操舵台，可操控潜艇下潜上浮。室内有船长的床铺、怀表、注射器等私人物品。前窗可观察潜艇前方海域，右侧观景窗可看到海底景象。

visual.prompt: Interior of a 1910s submarine command room. A raised helm platform with brass controls, iron riveted walls, dim yellow electric lights, a narrow bed, and small round portholes showing dark ocean water. Cramped and claustrophobic. Oil painting style, dark blue and rust palette.

name: 走廊
description: 铁鲸号内部的狭窄走廊，连接各舱室。左侧设有观景窗，可看到外面深邃的海水。走廊拐弯处有视野盲区。天花板上方是通风管道。

visual.prompt: A narrow claustrophobic submarine corridor from the 1910s. Iron walls with rivets, pipes running along the ceiling, a small porthole on the left showing deep dark water. Dim yellow light from electric bulbs. Oil painting style.

name: 贵宾房
description: 为伊藤重工贵宾准备的单人房间。空间狭小，有一张床、一张桌子。灯光昏黄。门外是走廊。

visual.prompt: A tiny single-berth cabin in a 1910s submarine. A narrow bed, a small desk, dim yellow electric light, iron walls with rivets. A sense of claustrophobia. Oil painting style.

name: 双人房
description: 樊宗楚和张辜仁的住处。两张单人床，空间极为狭窄。灯光昏黄。

visual.prompt: A cramped double-berth submarine cabin from the 1910s. Two narrow beds, dim lighting, iron walls, personal items scattered about. Oil painting style.

name: 潜水准备室
description: 存放潜水装备的房间。墙上有消防斧、潜水服、铁鞋和封闭头盔。与潜水过渡舱之间有一扇密封门和观察窗。头盔被扣住后只能用钥匙打开。

visual.prompt: A submarine diving preparation room from the 1910s. Diving suits hanging on walls, heavy iron boots, brass diving helmets, a fire axe on the wall. A sealed door with a porthole leads to another chamber. Dim lighting. Oil painting style.

name: 潜水过渡舱
description: 连接潜艇内部与外部海底的舱室。设有注水阀门和排水装置，可注水后打开侧面出入门通向海底。上方空气管道连接长软管为潜水员供气。

visual.prompt: A flooded submarine airlock chamber from the 1910s. Seawater fills the space, a diving suit stands motionless in the water, connected to an air hose from above. A sealed side door leads to the dark ocean. Eerie and terrifying. Oil painting style.

name: 厨房
description: 铁鲸号的厨房。不能生火，只能用电加热管烧水。存放罐头食物和淡水。有一张临时简易床——有人曾藏身于此。罐中有一只活章鱼。

visual.prompt: A small submarine kitchen from the 1910s. Canned food stacked on shelves, an electric heating coil, a makeshift bed in the corner, a jar with a live octopus tentacle emerging. Dim yellow light. Oil painting style.

name: 会议厅（餐厅）
description: 铁鲸号的多功能厅，兼作餐厅。船员在此用餐和开会。

visual.prompt: A small submarine meeting room doubling as a dining hall from the 1910s. A narrow table, metal chairs, dim electric lighting, iron walls. Oil painting style.

name: 船员舱
description: 王赶海和孙孟真的住处。极窄的上下铺，通风口在上方。空气混浊，没有多余活动空间。

visual.prompt: A cramped submarine crew cabin from the 1910s. Narrow bunk beds, a ventilation duct on the ceiling, barely enough room to stand. Dim lighting, iron walls. Oil painting style.

name: 卫生间
description: 铁鲸号的卫生间，关门后可保持密封。

visual.prompt: A tiny submarine bathroom from the 1910s. Minimal fixtures, iron walls, dim lighting. Oil painting style.

name: 禁闭室
description: 用于惩罚违反规定的船员。关门后密封，与卫生间和船员舱共用同一条通风管道。

visual.prompt: A dark submarine brig cell from the 1910s. A single bed, iron door, no windows. Oppressive and claustrophobic. Oil painting style.

name: 轮机舱
description: 铁鲸号的机械核心区域。存放柴油和各种机械部件。王赶海每天在此工作值班八小时。

visual.prompt: A submarine engine room from the 1910s. Large diesel machinery, pipes, gauges, oil stains. Dim industrial lighting. Oil painting style.

name: 发电室
description: 铁鲸号的发电区域。存放发电机和通风管道图纸。孙孟真每天在此值班维护发电机。

visual.prompt: A submarine generator room from the 1910s. A large electrical generator, wiring, circuit panels, ventilation diagrams on the wall. Dim lighting. Oil painting style.

name: 仓库
description: 铁鲸号的物资仓库。存放各种补给品。有一张吊床——颜睦宛曾藏身于此。

visual.prompt: A submarine cargo hold from the 1910s. Crates and supplies stacked around, a hammock strung up in the corner, dim lighting. Oil painting style.

name: 毗海村码头
description: 毗海村的临海码头，铁鲸号停泊之处。长约四十米的潜艇半浮在水面上，钢铁艇身严丝合缝，上方入口打开。

visual.prompt: A rural Chinese coastal dock in 1914. A large grey submarine floats in the water, about 40 meters long. A few people stand on the wooden dock. Overcast sky, yellow sea. Oil painting style.
